title: Absolutely fabulous, a real ski hotel next to the valley station (and the apres ski) of Kreischberg
positive_comment: The Gasthof is clean, the room was also very neat. Both the breakfast and the dinner was very delicious and the menu selection was divers. On of us has gluten intolerancy, it was handled in minutes and we got gluten free bread freshly baked!

The location is excellent, next to the lift and bars.
Good breakfast and dinner, kind staff.

We really liked the food, both breakfasts and dinners offered wide variety of food selection of really good quality. Dinners were truly delicious. Rooms are spacious enough with sufficient storage space even in the bathroom.
negative_comment: Rooms were quite warm even when the heating was down.

positive_comment:

Osoblje ljubazno!
negative_comment: npr da ima više sadržaja osim saune

positive_comment: A szálloda elhelyezkedése, az ágy, a reggeli és az ízletes vacsora a kiváló és különleges desszertekkel. A szakácsot, a fiatal pincéreket és a recepcióst külön kiemelnénk, nagyon jó és pozitív emléket hagytak bennünk.
negative_comment: A folyamatosan kellemetlen szag a szobai mellékhelyiségben, hiányzott egy mini hűtőszekrény a szobából, valamint a szálloda bejáratához felvezető lépcső állapota.

positive_comment: Nagyon kedves személyzet, finom ételek. A szobák tökéletesek egy sítrip-re a haverokkal.

Igazi hagyományos osztrák alpesi vendégház fa belsővel, kitűnő konyhával, udvarias és segítőkész személyzettel, kulturált szobákkal, fűtött sítárolóval, tökéletes helyszínen. A konyha hagyományos alapon korszerű osztrák és magyar fogásokat kínál svédasztalos rendszerben, pincérekkel, este Stube. Saját parkoló, működő wifi. Szauna az árban.
negative_comment: Minden tetszett, nagyon jól éreztük magunkat két kicsivel.

title: Családias, hangulatos, magyon
positive_comment: Hangulatos, családias szállás. Tökéletes azoknak egy meghitt kedves panzió hangulatára várnak. Finom ennivalo, kedvesség. Biztosan visszatérünk még.
negative_comment: Minimális apróság: Sotetito függöny jól jött volna, mert a kinti fények bevilagitanak.

positive_comment: Nice, clean, well equipped, good wellness, nice bar and food.
The hotel is nice and close to ski resorts. The breakfast and the dinner was satisfying, the staff was also kind.
negative_comment: I would strongly recommend reconsidering the wellness area: the pool has very cold water, and especially during the winter it is not comfortable. In addition, I would recommend changing the sauna concept (now it is adults only). The food was fine, but wider assortment would be better.

title: We are very satisfied with the hotel.
positive_comment:
The staff was very freindly and helpful, especially in the restaurant. They tried to do their best to fulfill your requests.
Foods are tasty. There are plenty of facilities and services: parking place, gym, swimming pool, saunna, washing room, ski stuff storage, etc.

title: Nice, peaceful hotel at a great location
positive_comment: Great location, spacious rooms, nice breakfast, nice staff.
negative_comment:
Dinner could have been better, but it was still OK.
I was missing a jacuzzi.
The pool was quite cold, but warm enough for swimming.

title: If you want to get away from it all, this is the place
positive_comment: Great hotel in small village. Typical Austrian Hospitality
negative_comment: Bartender was grumpy

title: Great experience with a few minor drawbacks
positive_comment:
We had a great stay at this hotel! The entire place was extremely clean, and the staff was not only very nice but also incredibly helpful, making our experience even better. The hotel is well-equipped, providing everything we needed.

The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options to suit different tastes.
negative_comment:
One downside was that the room we received was different from what was shown in the pictures, which was a bit disappointing.

The dinner could have been better. Almost every dish contained paprika and onion, which might not be to everyone’s liking. While we fully support minimizing food waste, it felt like the dinner menu was designed based on leftover ingredients from breakfast rather than a well-thought-out selection.

positive_comment: A great team working to make sure everyone was looked after

title: Generally it was good. Nice foods, wellness, drinks. I would give 4 out of 5 stars because of the parking experience, bu
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, one of our best stays in austria! Delicious foods in the restaurant, clean rooms, nice wellness facility.
negative_comment:
Out of all the goods there were only two things we did not like:
- Food varieties
- Parking

The food was super delicious but the breakfast was essentially always the same, and I would have loved if I saw some fantasy in the dinner.

The parking was ok, but it is not convenient/comfortable at all. Asking 6 euros/day for this parking experience is not fair. The hotel is fully booked and the best case if there is one parking spot for each room.. If you arrive late your only options will be the 2 parking spots right next to the walls, left from the entrance. These spots are so tight that I cant even open the door on either sides.

title: Perfect ski getaway 🎿
positive_comment: Everything was perfect - from the location, staff, rooms, food.. everything! Will be back 🙌🎿
Very nice hotel with lovely wellness area, climbing wall, cozy lobby bar and dog friendly rooms. Breakfast and dinner were good with gluten free options.
negative_comment: A tea/coffee maker would be a nice to have in the rooms.

Perfect location.
Great service

Die nähe zum lift, personal unvorstellbar freundlich, freundlicher Empfang beim Ankommen, freundliche Bedienung u zuvorkommend. Alles wurde genauestens erklärt. Sehr sehr gutes Frühstück und perfektes Abendbuffet. Kommen auf jeden Fall wieder

title: War ein paar schöne Schitage, in perfekter Lage.
positive_comment:
Das Frühstück und das Abendessen war ausreichend und gut.
Die Lage zu Lift ist perfekt. Das Zimmer war sauber und die Größe optimal.

ist halt doch Urlaub in Österreich.

title: Ausgezeichnete Lage beim Lift, für eine 3-Sterne Unterkunft o.k. aber etwas zu teuer!
positive_comment: Die Lage des Kellerschlössels ist direkt an der Talstation, Parkplätze für die Gäste sind vorhanden, ebenso ein Raum für die Schi und die Schischuhe (beheizt), 2 Saunen kostenlos zu benützen. Ausstattung für ein 3-Stern-Hotel ist in Ordnung. Frühstück und Abendessen in reicher Auswahl vorhanden
negative_comment: Müsli beim Frühstück fehlt, Fernsehkanäle größtenteils nur in ungarischer Sprache (wohl wegen der vielen ungarischen Gäste am Kreischberg ...) - kein ORF Programm und auch kein Servus-Kanal.

title: Beste Lage zur Talstation, Unterkunft empfehlenswert
positive_comment: HP: Frühstück war sehr gut und vielfältig. Abendessen mit 2 versch. Suppen, 3 Hauptspeisen inkl. salat und als Nachspeise versch. Desserts

Die Lage ist einzigartig.
Es wurde uns eine extra vegetarische Platte serviert.
Frühstück ist vielfältig und ausreichend.
negative_comment: Wenn man später zu Abendessenbuffet kommt, kann schon etwas aus sein, das dann nicht mehr nachgebracht wird.

title: Gelungener Städtetrip mit sehr gutem Frühstück
positive_comment: Die Lage ist absolut ideal für einen Städtetrip. Das Hotel ist sehr luxuriös. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich.
negative_comment: Die Zimmer verfügen über etwas viel Technik

positive_comment: Perfekte Lage, alle Sehenswürdigkeiten sind fußläufig in wenigen Minuten erreichbar. Auch Haltstellen der Straßenbahn gleich beim Hotel. Sehr schöne Zimmer mit gehobener Ausstattung.
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Das Almanac Palais Vienna ist ein wunderschönes, stilvolles Hotel mit hervorragendem Service, traumhaften Zimmern und ei
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im Almanac Palais Vienna war rundum hervorragend. Wir hatten ein wunderschönes, großzügiges und sehr komfortables Zimmer im eleganten Maisonette-Stil mit zwei getrennten Betten – genau wie gewünscht. Alles war äußerst sauber und gepflegt. Besonders gefallen hat uns der schöne Blick auf den Park.

Das gesamte Team war jederzeit sehr hilfsbereit, aufmerksam und freundlich, sodass wir uns sofort willkommen gefühlt haben. Auch die Lage des Hotels ist perfekt: mitten im Herzen von Wien, mit vielen Sehenswürdigkeiten, Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten direkt in der Umgebung. Alles war schnell und bequem erreichbar.

Wir können dieses Hotel mit voller Überzeugung immer wieder weiterempfehlen und würden jederzeit gerne wiederkommen
negative_comment: Es gibt nichts auszusetzen, es ist alles perfekt

title: Ich komme wieder!
positive_comment: Der sehr freundliche und persönliche Empfang, die komfortablen Zimmer und die sehr gute Lage.
negative_comment: Nichts.

positive_comment: Frühstück nicht zu toppen, Personal superfreundlich
negative_comment: dir Regulation von Licht, Klimaanlage und Jalousien und auch Bidet hat uns machmal überfordert

title: Phantastische Lage in schönem Gebäude, aber nicht 5-Sterne
positive_comment: Perfekte Lage für ein Kultur-Wochenende und Stadtbesichtigung. Nettes Personal, gute Frühstücks- und Poolzeiten. Alles sehr sauber. Schönes Gebäude.
negative_comment: Ursprüngliches Zimmer (Deluxe Almanac) hatte eine Verbindungstür zum Nachbarzimmer, durch die man jedes Wort der Nachbarn gehört hat (absolutes No-Go in 5-Sterne-Niveau), das Personal war allerdings sehr bemüht und und hat ermöglicht, das Zimmer zu wechseln. Glastür Bad/ Toilette gewöhnungsbedürftig. Frühstück: Bestellung von Frühstücksgerichten in vorgegebenen Kombinationen ermöglicht keine Flexibilität, verschiedene kleine Dinge zu kosten..

positive_comment: Top Service an der Rezeption, Lage war perfekt, Frühstück war super, ruhige Zimmer, sehr freundlicher Concierge, schönes Interieur
negative_comment: Service beim Frühstück war freundlich jedoch komplett chaotisch. Wir sind draußen gesessen und mussten oft ewig warten bis jemand vom Servicepersonal gekommen ist. Oftmals war jemand an Tischen nebenan um Bestellungen aufzunehmen jedoch auf Handzeichen wurde gar nicht geachtet. Viele Bestellungen kamen dann raus und das Personal wusste nicht für welchen Tisch die Bestellungen waren, ein no-go für Frühstück zu dem Preis. Ebenfalls kein Salz und Pfeffer auf den Tischen. Großes Verbesserungspotential bei der Koordination.

positive_comment: Incantevole. Posizione eccellente. Pulizia e accoglienza ineccepibili. Colazione e cena al glass bistro di ottima qualità .
negative_comment: Nulla .

title: Un rêve!
positive_comment: Cet hôtel est juste parfait! Rien à redire, confort, espace, la qualité des services, le petit déjeuner et l'endroit ou il est servi, etc.
negative_comment: Tout est parfait.

title: Super Tolles Wochenende!
positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels war optimal - sehr zentral gelegen! vor dem Hotel gibt es die Möglichkeit eine Elektroauto-Ladestation zu nutzen. Die hoteleigene Garage (kostenpflichtig - aber jeden Cent wert) haben wir sehr gerne genutzt. man kann mit der Zimmerkarte immer wieder ein- und ausfahren. Das Hotel macht einen sehr modernen Eindruck. das Personal ist sehr bemüht und sehr freundlich. Das Frühstück und Abendessen (wir hatten HP) waren sehr gut und täglich abwechselnd. Die Zimmer sehr sauber. das gesamte Hotel eigentlich sehr übersichtlich aufgebaut. der Indoor-Pool ist eine tolle Angelegenheit und für Kids traumhaft. Es gibt auch eine Saunalandschaft. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
negative_comment: wir konnten nichts negatives feststellen

positive_comment: Das Buffet beim Frühstück und Abendessen lässt keine Wünsche offen. Das gesamte Personal ist sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend.  Das Schwimmbad und der Fitnessraum sind schon ab 7 Uhr Früh geöffnet. Das Spielezimmer mit Kletterwand hat unseren Kindern sehr gefallen. Tischtennis kann man auch spielen, die Schläger können ausgeborgt werden. In der Umgebung gibt es zahlreiche Ausflugsziele.

title: Für eine erholsame Auszeit zu betriebsam
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Personal, sehr sauber, Essen gut.
negative_comment:
Man spürt dass das Gebäude ursprünglich nicht als Hotel konzipiert wurde es wirkt klinisch. 
Es gab sehr viele lärmende Kinder besonders im Hallenbad des Wellnessbereiches.

title: Wir würden wieder kommen.
positive_comment: Hell, sauber, ruhig. Angenehme Sauna. Schöne Halle mit Leseecke. Freundliches Personal. Kosmetik im Haus. Geräumiges Zimmer mit Balkon und Blick auf das Stift. Genügend Platz für alle Gäste.
negative_comment: Schwimmbad eher klein und ständig von Kindern besetzt. Aber das ist bei einem Familienhotel zu erwarten.p

title: Perfekter Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstücksangebot sowie auch sehr gutes Angebot zum Abendbuffet, sehr nettes Personal, angenehmer SPA-Bereich,

title: Sehr angenehmer Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Sehr gutes und reichhaltiges Frühstückbuffet, angenehmer SPA-Bereich, sehr gutes Abendbuffet, freundliche Bedienung.
Schön ausgestattet, Bad mit Wanne, Wasserbetten im allgemeinen Ruhebereich, freundliches Personal
negative_comment: Saunaöffnungszeiten

positive_comment: Das Personal im Speisesaal, sowie der Bar war sehr sehr freundlich.

Das gesamte Hotel ist in einem überaus gepflegten Zustand. Der Umstand, dass es sich um ein ehemaliges Krankenhaus handelt kommt positiv zum Tragen, da es hier keine engen Hotelflure gibt, sondern alles schön weit und luftig ist. Das Personal war durchweg freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Angebot über die Feiertage, insbesondere für Kinder, vielfältig.

title: Schön,
positive_comment: Angenehmer Gym und Spa-Bereich, sehr sauber, gut eingerichtet, groß und hell.
negative_comment: Das Abendessen war leider nicht besonders gut.

title: Struttura pulita e accogliente.
positive_comment:
Della struttura ho apprezzato soprattutto la pulizia, sia della camera che delle aree comuni. Molto comodo anche il parcheggio nel garage sotterraneo. Il personale è sempre stato disponibile ed educato: qualunque richiesta è stata accolta senza problemi. Abbiamo trovato molto buono anche il cibo del ristorante. La struttura è assolutamente adatta alle famiglie con bambini. La stanza dedicata ai più piccoli è davvero bella, con una parete di arrampicata che mia figlia ha adorato.
La struttura dispone di tutto l’occorrente per rilassarsi e tenersi in forma: palestra, piscina e una bella area spa.
negative_comment: Per quanto riguarda gli aspetti meno positivi, la piscina è risultata piuttosto piccola e le sdraio disponibili non erano sufficienti rispetto al numero di ospiti. Durante il nostro soggiorno, l’acqua delle piscine era fredda, rendendo difficile il bagno, soprattutto per i bambini più piccoli. Inoltre, il personale della reception non parlava italiano, il che in alcune situazioni ha reso la comunicazione più complicata. Infine, la struttura non offre animazione né per i bambini né per gli adulti.

positive_comment: Molto bello per i bambini, dal personale, alla cena alla piscina

title: Rilassante
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella con sala fitness piscina e centro benessere, e spazi esterni per rilassarsi. Comodo parcheggio sotterraneo
negative_comment: C’ero già stato nel 2017 e all’epoca il ristorante era all’altezza dell’hotel. Adesso no, poca scelta e la cucina chiude prestissimo la sera. Solo la colazione resta ottima

title: Posto dove rilassarsi e rigenerarsi!
positive_comment:
Albergo situato nel centro di St. Lambrecht.
Struttura con molti servizi per le famiglie, stanza giochi, parete arrampicata, tavolo da ping pong e servizio baby sitter. Piscina bellissima e zona Spa curata e molto pulita.
Colazione continentale abbondante a buffet e cena con ampia scelta.
Stanza familiare ampia con letto matrimoniale e divano letto per i ragazzi.
Molto apprezzato e comodo il book disponibile in reception con le escursioni e posti da visitare nelle vicinanze o nel raggio di 30 km dalla struttura.
negative_comment: Proporrei di avere il menù anche in lingua inglese, non solo in tedesco.

The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options to suit different tastes.

title: Generally it was good. Nice foods, wellness, drinks. I would give 4 out of 5 stars because of the parking experience, bu
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, one of our best stays in austria! Delicious foods in the restaurant, clean rooms, nice wellness facility.
negative_comment:
Out of all the goods there were only two things we did not like:
- Food varieties
- Parking

The food was super delicious but the breakfast was essentially always the same, and I would have loved if I saw some fantasy in the dinner.

The parking was ok, but it is not convenient/comfortable at all. Asking 6 euros/day for this parking experience is not fair. The hotel is fully booked and the best case if there is one parking spot for each room.. If you arrive late your only options will be the 2 parking spots right next to the walls, left from the entrance. These spots are so tight that I cant even open the door on either sides.

title: Perfect ski getaway 🎿
positive_comment: Everything was perfect - from the location, staff, rooms, food.. everything! Will be back 🙌🎿

title: Schönes, künstlerisches Hotel ohne adäquates Frühstück
positive_comment: Sehr schön eingerichtetes Hotel, viel Kunst, sehr hochwertige schöne Badezimmer, guter Pool- und Spabereich, top Lage, hochwertige Zimmer, 2x täglich Zimmerservice.
negative_comment: Frühstück. Es gab nur so vorgefertigte Cafe-Haus-Frühstück-Elemente, überwiegend mässige Discounter-Qualität, kaum Möglichkeit der Individualisierung, viele Frühstück-Standard-Produkte gab es gar nicht, Personal überfordert (vor allem bei Abweichungen zu ihren Standards ("haben wir nicht, kennen wir nicht"). Im Vergleich zu den schönen und variantenreichen Frühstück-Buffets, die in 4-Sterne und 5-Sterne in der ganzen Welt üblich sind, eine echte Enttäuschung. Im Vergleich zu der unterdurchschnittlichen Qualität sind die überdurchschnittlichen Preise fürs Frühstück nicht angemessen, teilweise geradezu grotesk. Ich bezahle gerne mehr, dann muss man aber auch das Niveau anheben. Anspruch und Wirklichkeit klaffen hier weit auseinander.

positive_comment:
Ich möchte eine besonders hilfreiche Concierge Katharina E. hervorheben. 
Sie hat uns in einer medizinischen ( Notfall-) Situation souverän, tatkräftig, mit Übersicht und empathisch unterstützt! Wir sind Ihr so dankbar dafür!!

title: Super Hotel in Top Lage
positive_comment: Super tolles Hotel direkt am Stadtpark (trotzdem sicher). Das Frühstück war der Hammer,  noch nie so ein tolles Frühstück gehabt. Das Zimmer war sehr modern und sauber. Auch der Pool war sehr sauber und schön. Die Mitarbeiter sind sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Im der Nähe des Bahnhof Wien Mitte mit direkter Verbindung zum Flughafen. Gute Anbindung an die Öffis und die Stadtrundfahrtbusse. Alles in der Altstadt ist fußläufig erreichbar.
negative_comment: Es fehlen Haken, um die Bademäntel aufzuhängen. Auch wäre es schön,  wenn man das Fenster zum Lüften öffnen könnte.

title: Bel établissement avec quelques déceptions inadmissibles pour un établissement de ce niveau
positive_comment: Confort, emplacement,personnel d’accueil,piscine et sauna
negative_comment:
Problème de porte à notre chambre et on s’est retrouvé bloqué 
Personnel du restaurant non attentif, vaisselle défectueuse 
Cocktail au bar préfabriqué ( negroni)

positive_comment: Un établissement parfaitement tenu, propre, personnel serviable.

title: Très beau idéalement placé
positive_comment: Emplacement parfait très belle chambre magnifique bâtiment historique
negative_comment: Service en chambre laborieux, chambre nettoyée à 17h tous les jours....

title: On reviendra pour une prochaine visite à Vienne.
positive_comment: Chambre très bien avec vue sur une grande place. Salle de bains très bien. Emplacement parfait pour le centre-ville (musées 5 min à pied). Piscine (15m) dans l'ancien coffre-fort de la banque. Saunas très bien. Hôtel très tranquille.
negative_comment: Le service dans la salle à manger pas assez rapide. On a dû attendre longtemps sur les boissons, café, etc. À améliorer. Personnel de chambre qui sonne à 9h pour faire le ménage. Pas de mort-d'homme, mais on a vu mieux pour un 5*.

title: Absolutely exceptional stay.
positive_comment:
Absolutely exceptional stay.! 
The staff were incredibly attentive and genuinely caring from the moment I arrived. They even kindly allowed me to stay beyond the official check-out time, which I truly appreciated.
The level of service is impeccable — truly top class. Every detail reflects professionalism and sincere hospitality.
The location is perfect, right in the heart of Vienna. The hotel itself is a magnificent historic building that beautifully reflects the elegance and spirit of the city. You can truly feel the atmosphere of Vienna throughout the interiors, the ambiance, and the overall design.
Breakfast is fantastic with an excellent selection and outstanding quality.
I highly recommend this hotel. Everything here is truly of the highest level, and I’m very grateful to the entire team for their genuine care and outstanding service.
I would absolutely choose to stay here again when I return to Vienna.

title: Exceptional.
positive_comment: Everything. The location, staff, rooms & facilities were exceptional. The hotel staff went above & beyond for us and were by far the friendliest. The rooms were beautiful & large. The hotel was in the heart of everything! HIGHLY recommend.
My stay was truly special – everything was wonderful. Many thanks to the team for being so kind and attentive during my entire visit.

title: Just wonderful!
positive_comment: This was one of the best overall hotel experiences we have ever had in Vienna! The staff was so polite, the service was impecable! The rooms are highly equiped for a perfectly relaxing stay!

title: superb, beautiful, luxurious
positive_comment: The hotel met all our expectations. Superb decoration, clean, a sense of luxury at every turn. We have been to many 5* hotels but Park Hyatt Wien is at the top. The staff is very friendly, especially the gentleman at the entrance, the Concierge and the gentleman at the reception. The breakfast is made of top quality ingredients and looks perfect. See you again soon!
negative_comment: everything was great

title: One of the best hotel in Vienna. High standards, very good balance between efficiency and smile of employees, a place to
positive_comment: Good location, nice and monumental building, very positive and friendly vibe. Helpfull team with a special note for Karim from Concierge. One of the best I ever met.

title: Superbe séjours à la montagne sans voiture,

Very nice hotel with lovely wellness area, climbing wall, cozy lobby bar and dog friendly rooms. Breakfast and dinner were good with gluten free options.
negative_comment: A tea/coffee maker would be a nice to have in the rooms.

title: It's worth it if you don't care about resting.
positive_comment: A very nice, well-organized hotel in a strategic location just a few meters from Piazza Santo Stefano. The decor is beautiful, stylish, and harmonious. It's worth a stay.
negative_comment: It's not suitable for rest, because the rooms overlook the pedestrian street, where every day for at least five hours, improvised street performers sing at the top of their lungs, simulating opera, through amplifiers. This prevents anyone from resting, even though the windows are double-glazed, but you can still hear everything. It's a shame; it would be enough to stop this noise every day outside a hotel where people should have the right to rest.

title: Centrally located hotel in old world style
positive_comment: It is centrally located in the old town. There are lots of restaurants, cafes and cars within walking distance. The room was spacious enough for both of our suitcases out. The bathroom was huge with double sinks. The breakfast buffet was good although a little pricey but then everything is pricey in Vienna when converting to Australian dollars.
negative_comment: One of the photos for the room we booked showed a large room with a lounge and table and chairs. Our room didn’t have a lounge. The bath towels were a little small and not very thick.

title: Charming hotel no
positive_comment: Charming old world hotel in a fabulous location. Our room was very large with a comfortable seating area. Some antique furnishings and sparkling chandeliers fit right in with the surrounding neighborhood. Great shower.  Ideal location for easy walking access to all the sights in the Inner City and many restaurants and cafes.
Classic yet everything looks new. Very clean. Huge room. Location can’t be better. Great value for money.

title: Central location convenient for all one wished to see
positive_comment: Room comfortable and well cleaned, for Austria the duvets were a little heavy, but not worth bringing it to attention.
negative_comment:
There was a bar and the prices were reasonable, unlike some hotels but it would have been convenient to be able to have a light meal in the evening, not necessarily cooked perhaps cold meats or cheese. After a long day this would have been useful . Having to go out after a busy day was a bit much
Breakfast was expensive and while ok not quite worth the price

title: Still a great hotel to stay at
positive_comment:
Beautiful hotel, 2nd time stayed.
Great location
Excellent friendly staff
negative_comment: No Tea or Coffee in room and TV not smart TV

title: Perfect.
positive_comment: If you ever wish to visit the Vienna opera and allow yourself the perfect place to stay almost next to the Opera house, a little luxury of a beautiful building, spacious rooms, a location in the middle of Vienna (yet windows that isolate possible noise), a breakfast that has it all... well, this is it. Ambassador, we will certainly come again!

title: Perfecta
positive_comment:
La localización, el personal y su atención, el edificio y las habitaciones 
En general casi todo de 10
negative_comment: Alguna de mora en la limpieza, pero  bien en general

title: A charming hotel in a great location offerring exceptional service
positive_comment: The hotel is in a great location near the opera house and some of the best shopping streets and restaurants. The staff and all services from front desk to housekeeping were exceptional. The room and bathroom were very spacious and comfortable decorated in period style. We loved our stay there and will return

title: Fantastic great hotel
positive_comment: Great location and stuff were very friendly and professional. Very clean and lovely spacious room

title: It was a wonderful experience. I’d be happy to stay there a gain.
positive_comment: The setting was great. The building was beautiful.
negative_comment: N/A

title: Good location, good price, and good communication, everything needed for a stay during your travels
positive_comment: We arrived late due to a border traffic and informed the host that we are going to arrive very late.  She understood the situation and offered a great solution how we can access the room and did everything as instructed. We were able to get in the room without any problems. We thank the host for the good instructions

title: Perfect Balkan travel stop
positive_comment: The atmosphere is very relaxed and friendly and dinner was great. The room was super clean. The location close to the highway makes it a perfect overnight stay when travelling. There's plenty of parking space.
negative_comment: In the quiet season, the kitchen probably closes after all expected customers have been served, so don't rely on closing times without contacting them. Breakfast was a little chaotic, but in the end, I got everything I needed. The street is relatively quiet, but you can hear the nearby highway, so I slept with earplugs in.

title: Excellent location to relax after a long drive, very friendly hosts: Highly recomendable
positive_comment: Excellent location, near the highway but still in a beautiful natural setting; rooms were spotless and clean, very comfortable, nice breakfast and the Balkan inspired restaurent was of very high quality
negative_comment: Perhaps slightly dated bathrooms, but extremelly clean, no complaints

negative_comment:

Very nice and serviceminded host
negative_comment: It was located by a small road not very far from highway. We thought it would be quiet but there was a lot of traffic and since it was very hot weather we needed to open windows and it became very noicy. However, for 1 night it was just a minor thing.

positive_comment: Rooms are little older, but everything is really nice and clean. Delicious Balkan food, I totally recommend.

title: thank you for all the attention and kindness you have given us.
positive_comment:
We booked on the way and drove late at night and got a call to see if we were coming. And we arrived, thank God, it was scary to drive at night in the rain on the Austrian autobahn with constant road works. We had a large room on the 3rd floor where we had everything we needed. Soft mattresses, I finally slept 😆. A buffet is available in the morning, simple but tasty.

Sofia, thank you for all the attention and kindness you have given us.

title: Una grata estancia
positive_comment: Todo. El personal muy amable, la habitación muy limpia, eso lo valoro mucho. La ubicación es muy buena, justo en el centro, al lado de la Catedral, Ópera, museos como el Albertina, la biblioteca… Estuvimos muy a gusto, repetiremos sin duda

title: Excelente

title: Prima
positive_comment: Sehr freundlich und zuverlässig. Wir sind sehr spät angekommen und haben uns sehr gefreut, dass für uns geöffnet wurde.

title: Gute Unterkunft für die Durchreise nach Kroatien!
positive_comment:
Diese Unterkunft ist perfekt für einen Zwischenstopp auf den Weg nach oder von Kroatien. Die Leiterin der Unterkunft ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Zimmer waren sauber und mit allen ausgestattet. Die Betten waren bequem und für mich perfekt.
Das Abendessen war sehr gut und das Preis Leistungs Verhältnis hat auf alle Fälle gepasst. Da wir sehr zeitig am Morgen abgereist sind, war das Frühstück überschaubar. Aber für unsere Zwecke hat alles gepasst.
negative_comment: gab nichts zu bemängeln

positive_comment: Ein einfacher Gasthof an der Straße. Gegenüber ein riesiges LKW und Baumaschinen-Depot. Im Prinzip alles in Ordnung und angesichts des niedrigen Preises auch empfehlenswert.
negative_comment: Die Lage

positive_comment: Zimmer gut, Frühstück gut, Essen am Abend voll in Ordnung. Sehr nette Wirtsleute. Gerne wieder

title: Immer wieder gern
positive_comment:
Sehr freundlich sympathische Gastgeber. Wunderbares reichhaltige Speisen. Sehr gute Küche!
Die Betten waren wunderbar. Das Bad ist in die Jahre gekommen jedoch sauber und voll Funktional.
negative_comment: Da fällt mir nichts ein.

positive_comment: Das Hotel ist perfekt für eine Übernachtung auf der Reise in den Süden. Das Zimmer war sehr sauber und das Personal sehr freundlich. Das Frühstück entsprach unseren Erwartungen.
Sympathisch und sehr zuvorkommend - genau so wie man sich einen Aufenthalt wünscht.

Hatte leider nicht viel Zeit. Späte Ankunft. frühe Abreise. Essen habe ich nur gesehen, sah sehr gut aus. Die Gäste waren sehr zufrieden. Unterkunft alles ok. Werde demnächst mit etwas mehr Zeit wieder buchen.

title: Eleganza viennese
positive_comment:
Il Park Hyatt Vienna sorge maestoso su una bella piazza del centro storico, incorniciato da un’atmosfera vivace e raffinata. Gli ambienti, ristrutturati con grande attenzione ai dettagli, coniugano il fascino dell’architettura classica con il comfort contemporaneo.
La posizione è ideale: situato nel cuore di una zona elegante e ben frequentata, l’hotel permette di raggiungere a piedi in pochi minuti le principali attrazioni culturali della città, dai sontuosi palazzi ai musei più famosi.
Le camere, spaziose e arredate con gusto.

title: Absolutely exceptional stay.
positive_comment:
Absolutely exceptional stay.! 
The staff were incredibly attentive and genuinely caring from the moment I arrived. They even kindly allowed me to stay beyond the official check-out time, which I truly appreciated.
The level of service is impeccable — truly top class. Every detail reflects professionalism and sincere hospitality.
The location is perfect, right in the heart of Vienna. The hotel itself is a magnificent historic building that beautifully reflects the elegance and spirit of the city. You can truly feel the atmosphere of Vienna throughout the interiors, the ambiance, and the overall design.
Breakfast is fantastic with an excellent selection and outstanding quality.
I highly recommend this hotel. Everything here is truly of the highest level, and I’m very grateful to the entire team for their genuine care and outstanding service.
I would absolutely choose to stay here again when I return to Vienna.

title: Exceptional.
positive_comment: Everything. The location, staff, rooms & facilities were exceptional. The hotel staff went above & beyond for us and were by far the friendliest. The rooms were beautiful & large. The hotel was in the heart of everything! HIGHLY recommend.
My stay was truly special – everything was wonderful. Many thanks to the team for being so kind and attentive during my entire visit.

title: Just wonderful!
positive_comment: This was one of the best overall hotel experiences we have ever had in Vienna! The staff was so polite, the service was impecable! The rooms are highly equiped for a perfectly relaxing stay!

title: superb, beautiful, luxurious
positive_comment: The hotel met all our expectations. Superb decoration, clean, a sense of luxury at every turn. We have been to many 5* hotels but Park Hyatt Wien is at the top. The staff is very friendly, especially the gentleman at the entrance, the Concierge and the gentleman at the reception. The breakfast is made of top quality ingredients and looks perfect. See you again soon!
negative_comment: everything was great

title: One of the best hotel in Vienna. High standards, very good balance between efficiency and smile of employees, a place to
positive_comment: Good location, nice and monumental building, very positive and friendly vibe. Helpfull team with a special note for Karim from Concierge. One of the best I ever met.

title: Excellent stay we will definitely return
positive_comment: Hotel excellent and in great central location for shopping and museums etc. All staff are excellent and very helpful. We used the Park Hyatt car transfer from the airport which was very efficient.
negative_comment: The only minor issue we had was during breakfast on one morning. The room was busy and staff seemed a bit overwhelmed. Our order was wrong so we sent it back for a replacement. In total we waited 40 minutes for our breakfast. We noticed others had similar issues on that day too.

title: Good location, good price, and good communication, everything needed for a stay during your travels
positive_comment: We arrived late due to a border traffic and informed the host that we are going to arrive very late. title: Hôtel agréable et bien situé
positive_comment:
Très grande chambre executive, couchage confortable (ce sont 2 lits accolés et non 1 grand lit)
Très bon petit déjeuner avec personnel agréable, 30€ par personne.
negative_comment:
Le gel douche /shampoing était deja quasiment vide a notre arrivée et n'a pas été rempli pendant le séjour,certes on peut le demander à la réception mais dans un établissement de ce niveau, on peut aussi s'attendre à ce que cela soit vérifié chaque jour. Le vanity kit utilisé dès le premier soir n'a été renouvelé qu'une fois en 5 jours.
Également j'avais signalé à la réservation et juste avant notre arrivée qu'il s'agissait de nos 20 ans de mariage précisément pendant notre séjour ; aucune petite attention quelle qu'elle soit ne nous a été offerte.
Personnel de l'accueil variable,certains aimables d'autres très froids.

title: Très bon emplacement

title: agréable mais pas satisfaisant
positive_comment: La propreté et la dimension de la chambre, ainsi que la localisation de l'hotel. Le personnel était gentil et souriant.
negative_comment: Dans un hotel de 5 etoiles avec une belle reputation, le client espère pouvoir faire un café dans sa chambre - c est à dire mettre une machine à café ne coute rien. Les hotels à 3 étoiles ont la machine dans les chambres. Dans la salle de bain, on aurait pu mettre des petits savons de qualité et de shampoo pour les cheveux, ainsi que body lotion pas diluée et très liquide. Dommage en épargnant de tous ces details, le client ne reste pas satisfait.

title: It's worth it if you don't care about resting.
positive_comment: A very nice, well-organized hotel in a strategic location just a few meters from Piazza Santo Stefano. The decor is beautiful, stylish, and harmonious. It's worth a stay.

This prevents anyone from resting, even though the windows are double-glazed, but you can still hear everything. It's a shame; it would be enough to stop this noise every day outside a hotel where people should have the right to rest.

Classic yet everything looks new. Very clean. Huge room. Location can’t be better. Great value for money.

Por duas vezes o pedido a la carte demorou mais de 20 min a vir e só depois de muita insistencia nossa. Não gostamos de alguns, apenas alguns empregados do restaurante, tentámos ir, fizemos uma reserva para jantar e pedimos uma mesa à janela, que foi confirmada sem problema. Quando fomos jantar não nos quiseram dar mesa à janela e foram grosseiros e desagradáveis  no trato e não nos deram a mesa sem qualquer justificação. Dado o tratamento recebido achamos melhor não jantar ali e fomos embora jantar a outro restaurante fora do hotel. Quando ao resto e aos empregados da receção, tudo impecável e ao nivel de um verdadeiro 5 estrelas. Foi pena os episódios do restaurante, caso contrário seria uma nota 10, sem dúvida em tudo o resto.

title: Absolutely exceptional stay.
positive_comment:
Absolutely exceptional stay.! 
The staff were incredibly attentive and genuinely caring from the moment I arrived. They even kindly allowed me to stay beyond the official check-out time, which I truly appreciated.
The level of service is impeccable — truly top class. Every detail reflects professionalism and sincere hospitality.
The location is perfect, right in the heart of Vienna. The hotel itself is a magnificent historic building that beautifully reflects the elegance and spirit of the city. You can truly feel the atmosphere of Vienna throughout the interiors, the ambiance, and the overall design.
Breakfast is fantastic with an excellent selection and outstanding quality.
I highly recommend this hotel. Everything here is truly of the highest level, and I’m very grateful to the entire team for their genuine care and outstanding service.
I would absolutely choose to stay here again when I return to Vienna.

title: Exceptional.
positive_comment: Everything. The location, staff, rooms & facilities were exceptional. The hotel staff went above & beyond for us and were by far the friendliest. The rooms were beautiful & large. The hotel was in the heart of everything! HIGHLY recommend.
My stay was truly special – everything was wonderful. Many thanks to the team for being so kind and attentive during my entire visit.

title: Just wonderful!
positive_comment: This was one of the best overall hotel experiences we have ever had in Vienna! The staff was so polite, the service was impecable! The rooms are highly equiped for a perfectly relaxing stay!

title: superb, beautiful, luxurious
positive_comment: The hotel met all our expectations. Superb decoration, clean, a sense of luxury at every turn. We have been to many 5* hotels but Park Hyatt Wien is at the top. The staff is very friendly, especially the gentleman at the entrance, the Concierge and the gentleman at the reception. The breakfast is made of top quality ingredients and looks perfect. See you again soon!

title: One of the best hotel in Vienna. High standards, very good balance between efficiency and smile of employees, a place to
positive_comment: Good location, nice and monumental building, very positive and friendly vibe. Helpfull team with a special note for Karim from Concierge. One of the best I ever met.

negative_comment: The only minor issue we had was during breakfast on one morning. The room was busy and staff seemed a bit overwhelmed. Our order was wrong so we sent it back for a replacement. In total we waited 40 minutes for our breakfast. We noticed others had similar issues on that day too.

title: Emplacement de luxe idéal pour visiter le centre de Vienne
positive_comment:

Accueil et concierge parfaits, centre spa avec piscine/jacuzzi, hammam et sauna inclus dans le prix de la chambre.
Le bâtiment ancien est magnifique et les chambres spacieuses avec domotique très fonctionnelle.
C'est sans hésitation que nous choisirons à nouveau cet hôtel pour un futur séjour à Vienne.

title: una bellissima struttura in pieno centro
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella e confortevole in ottima posizione a pochi passi dal teatro dell’Opera e dalla zona pedonale che porta a Santo Stefano. Tram e metro a pochi passi. Camera molto confortevole, con ampia doccia e molti accessori.  La SPA è piccolina ma confortevole ed efficiente. La colazione, servita al tavolo nell’annesso ristorante con ampio e prelibato menu, è davvero un “must”. Personale molto gentile. Il ristorante per la cena serve piatti ricercati e molto elaborati nella presentazione ma … a prezzi “importanti”. È attivo però anche un servizio in stanza con menu diurno e menu notturno.
negative_comment: Il menu del ristorante (dove si propone un menu degustazione a 7 portate a €.190/persona bevande escluse) non è visibile in stanza e lo si scopre solo una volta seduti a tavola. Stanti i prezzi potrebbe risultare una sgradevole sorpresa. Il cibo poi, creativo e molto elaborato, non è esaltante. Il bar la sera (dopo teatro ad esempio) offre solo da bere con qualche oliva. Sarebbe stato gradito almeno qualche snack …

title: Absolutely the best place to stay in Innere Stadt if Vienna. The location is central to all the major sites to see. Simp
positive_comment: Loved the location. Every staff member was exceptional in what they did. Service was amazing. So attentive to our needs and told us all about Vienna and sights to see. Food was magnificent in the restaurant and cafe. The bar and talents of the bar man were excellent. Reception staff were so welcoming and always happy. Best place to stay in Vienna in my opinion.

positive_comment: Location excellent. Room very nice. Walking distance to most attractions.

positive_comment: Very central to U1. Clean towels every day. Provided iron and board when asked

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes
positive_comment: Very central location, handy for sights, restaurants and local transport. The breakfast was excellent, good quality and cooked to order. Pleasant staff and comfortable, spacious room.
Cuarto muy cómodo, tenia un gym decente, sauna húmeda y seca.

title: Great stay! Great location! Photogenic room!
positive_comment: Great location, very comfy! Felt like home and very clean! We loved the circle windows and the sound proofed rooms! They also provided very good coffee and a complementary wine and chocolate! The shower products were exceptional and they restocked everyday!
negative_comment: The shower mixer valve was broken and couldn’t be adjusted to the right temperature but it was sufferable. The staff was overall disengaged and  apathetic and some members of the staff were  a bit rude.. except the cleaning ladies who were very polite.

positive_comment: It was very nice. Staff was very helpful, when we had issues with lock, they fixed within minutes.

title: Great location but make sure you get the room you booked
positive_comment: Excellent location and when we eventually got into our booked room the view was fantastic. Loved the shutters on the floor to ceiling windows that offered privacy and darkness for sleeping and it had a very nice bathroom. The porter was lovely, so friendly and helpful.

•When we arrived we were given the wrong room and was told they were overbooked and our room was gone and the new room was an upgrade - it was not. When I complained, in near tears as we wanted the specific room we booked and paid extra for, magically the room I booked was now available to me.
•The air conditioning pumped in cooking smells from early morning until late evening, it filled the room and made us nauseous.

positive_comment: I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience I had at your hotel. Your location is absolutely perfect, and I was deeply touched by the attentive and caring staff. I also want to extend a special thank you to everyone who sent gifts for our anniversary. It made our stay truly unforgettable.

title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.
positive_comment: This is a beautiful hotel, in particular the larger rooms facing the Ringstrasse.  No issues with noise as the double glazing is very effective.  The gym is fairly small, but the sauna and steam room are excellent and very luxurious.  The breakfast is extensive and delicious.  Staff are super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)

positive_comment: Excellent location to enjoy the city centre including various concerts. The breakfast was excellent with wide choices. The collaborative atmosphere of the staff was also nice. The room was a bit old but spacious and comfortable with the necessary amenities. The concierge was also friendly and helpful
negative_comment: The reception was efficient but not top notch considering the status of the hotel. They had little information on the restaurants beyond basics for arrangements during the holiday period. Communication with the cleaning staff seemed limited.

positive_comment: Perfect breakfast, location, hotel staff, room size, comfort of the bed.

title: Lovely hotel in the city centre
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, rooms were very comfortable. Staff extremely helpful and friendly. Great central location

title: It is an amazing Hotel with perfect breakfast and it is perfectly situated close to everything🥳
positive_comment:
It is very quiet and peaceful inside even though it was fully booked.
 The location is perfect.
negative_comment: Staff at breakfast could be a little more helpful with English guests.

title: Slightly faded traditional grand hotel
positive_comment: Location. Grand hotel style. Room was large. Welcoming reception. Good breakfast
negative_comment: Quirky HVAC and dated lighting controls. Poor room supplies. Needs updating.

title: Comfortable hotel with friendly staff in a convenient location.
positive_comment: The hotel is well-placed to reach the centre of Vienna and to visit other attractions by train. The room was well-appointed and comfortable.
negative_comment: There was no kettle in the room and only small coffee cups. It took a while for housekeeping to bring a kettle but we go there in the end. No larger cups were available in the room. The room was serviced fairly well although it was not hoovered over the 4 nights we were there.

title: Great hotel , feels homely, delivers on great breakfast, good service and is quiet in rooms
positive_comment: It’s old world charm. Location, good service , and excellent food in lobby bar (especially Goulash soup£.
negative_comment: Felt pillows smelled old and need replacing for new ones .

title: Tolles Hotel, tolles Personal und hervorragende Lage!
positive_comment:
Das Hotel liegt perfekt für einen Besuch in Wien! 
Das Personal ist super freundlich und zuvorkommend! 
Die Zimmer sind sehr gemütlich, alles ist super sauber und die Betten sind gemütlich!
negative_comment: Wenn man im Lamee übernachtet, kann es abends etwas lauter werden, da die Dachterasse nicht ausschließlich Hotelgästen zur Verfügung steht und viele Menschen an die Bar möchten. Das ist aber nur ein kleiner Punkt, den ich bemängeln kann.

title: Top Location, top Servicepersonal
positive_comment: Sehr tolles Zimmer - ideal für das Fotoshooting und das Übernachten der Braut
negative_comment: Es hat uns alles gefallen

title: Tolles Hotel im Zentrum
positive_comment:
Sehr zentrale Lage im Herzen von Wien
Tolle Aussicht aus dem Zimmer
Badezimmer sehr groß
Frühstück Mega, der nette Mann mit weniger Haaren beim Frühstück einfach der netteste und lustigste Mitarbeiter
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Das Hotel hat uns unsere Wien Reise noch schöner gemacht als sie schon war!
positive_comment: Hier hat uns wirklich ALLES gefallen! Wir waren begeistert! Die Lage ist perfekt, das Hotel sieht super edel aus. Der Empfang war der herzlichste den wir je hatten, das Personal ist der Hammer! Wie zuvorkommend und freundlich dort alle sind. Und nachdem wir in unser Zimmer kamen, waren wir alle sprachlos. So sauber, so schön eingerichtet, einfach nur toll! Ich würde es jedem weiterempfehlen!
negative_comment: Es gab nichts, was dort zu bemängeln war.

title: Gerne wieder.
positive_comment: Sehr zentrale Lage, kurze Wege in die City, zur Staatsoper, zur Hofburg, dem Dom u.a. Locations. Auch die öffentlichen Verkehrsmittel waren in wenigen Gehminuten erreichbar. Das Hotel hat eine eigene Rooftopbar, bei schönem Wetter top. Sehr freundliches, aufmerksames und hilfsbereites Personal. Die Koffer können bei früher Anreise und später Abreise im Hotel sicher deponiert werden. Zu unserem Hochzeitstag wurden wir vom Hotel mit einer sehr schönen und aufwendigen Zimmer-Dekoration und einer eisgekühlten Flasche Wein überrascht.
negative_comment: Die Klimaanlage war zu warm für uns und ließ sich nicht unter 19 Grad regulieren, Nur ausschalten.

title: Großartige Lage, um Wien zu erkunden!
positive_comment: Tolle Lage direkt hinter dem Stephansdom. Coole Zimmer und schöne Rooftop-Bar!
negative_comment: Zu kleines Restaurant, kein Gym!

title: Schöne Zeit in Wien 👍
positive_comment: Unglaubliche Aussicht in der des Stephansdoms 👍 dazugehörige Rooftopbar vis-a-vis wahr sehr gut 👍
negative_comment:
Leider war der Holzfußboden sehr schmutzig im Penthouse, man konnte nicht mit Socken gehen!
Dies war der einzige negative Punkt!

title: Wunderbare Lage
positive_comment: Frühstück war köstlich. Zimmer ist aussergewöhnlich, Personell -hilfsbereit. Perfekte Lage. Die Aussicht von unserem Zimmer aus ist wunderschön. Das Badezimmer wurde renoviert und sieht super aus.
negative_comment: Alles war perfekt

positive_comment: Location is great and receptionist was very nice and gave us early check-in as we arrived in the morning.

title: Guter Preis und tolle Lage!
positive_comment: Die Lage vom Hotel ist top! Absolut Zentrale Lage. Zudem gibt es eine tolle Rooftop Bar. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Unser Zimmer war schön groß und das Bett war bequem.
negative_comment: Unser Zimmer war schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Die Couch war sehr abgenutzt und hatte flecken. Die Terrasse war schon länger nicht mehr gereinigt worden, zudem waren diverse Flecken an der Wand.

title: Top Hotel für Städtetrip in Wien!
positive_comment: Sehr zentrale Lage! Zur U-Bahn Station Stephansplatz sind es nur ein paar Gehminuten. Sehr viele Restaurants und Läden in direkter Nähe. Echt top für einen Städtetrip…

title: Soggiorno di coppia a Vienna
positive_comment: La posizione centralissima. La pulizia e il letto comodissimo. Anche i cuscini molto comodi. La camera spaziosa e completa.
negative_comment: Nulla da aggiungere.

title: Bello!.
positive_comment: Ottima posizione della struttura ,staff gentile e attento all’esigenza dei clienti..
negative_comment: L’ascensore dell’edificio sempre strapieno per le persone che salgono al rooftop dell’hotel,per utilizzarlo bisogna aspettare vari minuti,e’sempre strapieno ..

positive_comment: Tutto, hotel moderno, pulito, le ragazze alla reception gentilissime. Posizione super, eravamo praticamente in centro, per la prossima visita a vienna ci ritornerò sicuramente
Abbiamo apprezzato la posizione centrale dell'hotel, la camera ampia e molto bene accessoriata, la reception aperta 24h e la disponibilità del personale in ogni fase (dalla prenotazione al check out)

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole in una posizione perfetta, con qualche piccolo dettaglio migliorabile ma assolutamente consigl
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella e curata, in pieno centro quindi comodissima per visitare la città a piedi. Le foto rispecchiano perfettamente la realtà, cosa non sempre scontata. La stanza era spaziosa, accogliente e ben arredata, dotata di tutti i comfort necessari per un soggiorno piacevole. Ottima anche la pulizia e l’atmosfera generale della struttura, moderna ma allo stesso tempo elegante.
negative_comment: L’hotel è diviso in due strutture: noi alloggiavamo nella parte Lamée, dove si trova anche il rooftop. Questo comportava la condivisione dell’ascensore con i clienti della terrazza, che non era sempre immediatamente disponibile. Inoltre, all’ingresso si percepiva a tratti odore di cibo proveniente dai locali interni: per un 5 stelle forse è un aspetto migliorabile. In ogni caso, nulla che abbia rovinato il soggiorno.

title: Ci tornerei
positive_comment: Hotel ben curato in un’ Ottima la posizione, bello il bagno con vasca e doccia
negative_comment: L’illuminazione é un po’ scarsa,

title: Super!.Soggiorno fantastico!.
positive_comment: Tutto perfetto..personale gentile,posizione ottima ,bella struttura ,curata,e pulita.
Camere moderne, bagno bellissimo e posizione fantastica
negative_comment: L’unica pecca è la grandezza della stanza.

title: Ottimo albergo peccato per la gestione rumorosa dell’aria condizionata riscaldamento.
positive_comment: Hotel in ottima posizione per visitare Vienna. Un mese fa ero al Leo Grande, altro ottimo albergo della stessa proprietà e , sebbene in tono minore anche il Topazz Lamee ne rispecchia la gestione. Devo fare un appunto alla gestione dell’A/C che è rumorosa e non si riesce d esautorare con notevole fastidio di notte. Per il resto nulla da dire e per il Lamee bellissima la terrazza sia della stanza che sopra all’albergo.
negative_comment: La gestione dell’aria condizionata e riscaldamento: troppo rumorosa di notte al limite del fastidio e non esautorabile. Mancavano indicazioni scritte per la gestione delle tapparelle e dei servizi.

The only thing that I really missed was a full size mirror in the room - to check your look as a whole before leaving the room.
negative_comment: The only thing that I really missed was a full size mirror in the room - to check your look as a whole before leaving the room. This made it inconvenient for me to walk into the shower in my dress shoes cause that's where the most full size  mirror is.

Un plus, le sauna et la piscine pour se détendre, le petit déjeuner royal ont rendu notre séjour en famille très agréable. Aucune fausse note.

Dos restaurantes, buen desayuno , parking, etc.

title: Un hotel ideal para hacer turismo en Viena.
positive_comment: Precioso edificio histórico en la zona histórica de Viena, a metros de los museos, los palacios, la Ópera y el Musikverein, y la zona de tiendas. Todo a pocos minutos.
negative_comment: En algunas cosas necesita un repaso. Pero las habitaciones son muy cómodas y silenciosas.

title: Vacaciones en Viena!
positive_comment:
El hotel es muy lindo se quedan cortas las fotografías en el página de Booking, es otro nivel.

La ubicación es perfecta cerca de todos los puntos más importantes de Viena, lo mejor a un costado de la Ópera para quienes hemos reservado alguna función durante nuestra estancia.

El desayuno del restaurante es de lo mejores que he probado en cualquier hotel de Europa, muy completo y con una amplia variedad para todos los gustos de verdad
que vale muchísimo la pena que lo incluyan en su reserva, estoy seguro que no se arrepentirán. 

Todo el personal del hotel desde la recepción, botones, camareros, servicio de limpieza todos con una excelente atención al cliente.

Definitivamente cuando regresemos a Viena volveremos a hospedarnos aquí!
negative_comment:
Ningún comentario negativo.  

La única recomendación es que el horario de room service fuera más amplio, tratamos de pedir algo de comer a las 10:30pm y nos indicaron que por la hora ya solo nos podían ofrecer bebidas.

title: Muy buena experiencia en Viena
positive_comment:
Ubicado justo en el centro. A distancia caminable de lo más importante de Viena.
El hotel tiene estilo antiguo como la ciudad pero es muy moderno igualmente.
El personal siempre fue muy amable.
Incluso fue el cumpleaños de mi hermano y le regalaron un pastel! También nos ayudaron con las reservas en restaurantes y espectáculos buenos.

title: Bienveillance, gentillesse dans un cadre magnifique, dans le centre de Vienne. Nous recommandons !
positive_comment:
Le choix de cet hôtel était lié à son emplacement central, avec un accès direct au centre historique et au transport en commun pour accéder aux différents sites touristiques à l'extérieur du centre ville.
Le personnel était bienveillant et très réactif. 
La chambre, y compris la salle de bain, étaient totalement comme sur les photos. Notre espace était très propre et très agréable.
Le petit-déjeuner, chouette moment de la journée, avec aussi un très bon accueil.
Nous avons aussi profité du bar rooftop de l'hôtel, averc une décoration hivernale très cocoon.
Bref, nous nous sommes sentis très bien accueillis.  Le service et nos demandes de bons "tuyaux" étaient vraiment au top.

negative_comment: Le personnel pas toujours sympathique. La robinetterie un peu vieillotte (le robinet du lavabo m'est resté en main...)

positive_comment: Un hôtel simple mais efficace et bon rapport qualité prix. Le petit déjeuner à 10€ est un buffet très copieux.

title: Das Hotel versprüht den Wiener Charm. Wir fühlten uns bestens aufgehoben.
positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind gross und die Betten bequem. Die Lage ist ausgezeichnet. Das Personal sehr zuvorkommend. Das Frühstück ist sehr vielseitig.
negative_comment: Die Zimmer sind schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen und könnten eine leichte Auffrischung brauchen. Die Storen waren defekt.

title: Eine gute Alternative zu den grossen Luxushotels
positive_comment: Wir kommen gerne in das Hotel, nicht zuletzt aufgrund der phantastischen Lage direkt im Zentrum. Auch ist das Frühstück mit seinen umfangreichen Wahlmöglichkeiten weit überdurchschnittlich.
negative_comment: Manchmal wünscht man sich etwas mehr persönliche Betreuung betreffend Einchecken Fragen oder ähnlicher Anliegen.Ein Hotel dieser Klasse darf hier nicht unter das gewünschte und bezahlte Niveau sinken.

title: Wir haben unser Hotel gefunden i ganz besonderen Dank an Fr Vanessa speziellen Dank an Fr. Va
positive_comment:
Die Meschlicheit, bringt dieses altehrwürdige Gebäude zum Strahlen!

Ich habe Parkinson und bin im AKH zur 
DBS Operation in ca. Einem Jahr vorgesehen. Eine starke Beeinträchtigung ist unübersehbar. Zum Frühstück kamen wir durch einen Komplett Ausfall von mir zu spät. Wir wurden hervorragend bedient und von den Herren wurde ich am Buffet gestürzt und begleitet und das unauffällig und unaufgefordert. Wir haben. Wir hatten  noch etwas am Zimmer tun fuhren mit einer  neuen Schlüssel Karte nochmal rauf wo ich in aller Ruhe mit meiner lieben Frau auf unseren Wagen warte den ein freundlicher junger Mann brachte.

Meine Damen und Herren   Respekt!
Mit freundlichen Grüßen 
Friedrich Laimighofer
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Nicht alles was Gold ist, glänzt.
positive_comment:
Sauberes Zimmer und Hotel.
Exzcellentes Frühstück, einfach genial plus Bedienung, zu empfehlen.
negative_comment:
KEIN Bügelservice für meinen Anzug.
KEINE Hausschuhe im Zimmer.
Bade- und Handtücher sind in die Jahre gekommen.
Zu kalt in der Hotelhalle.

title: Sicher ein Hotel wo man wieder besuchen kann.
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Frühstück. Sehr gutes Bett. Freundliches Person. Gute Lage. Das Hotel ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen.
negative_comment: Die Getränkepreise sind etwas hoch. Deswegen sucht man sich etwas anderes in der Stadt.

title: Die Atmosphäre im ganzen Hotel ist einfach wunderschön.
positive_comment: Klimaanlage funktionierte bei der Anreise nicht. Sehr netter Techniker hat das Problem umgehend behoben. Service beim Frühstück ist perfekt. Auch bei großem Andrang behält das Personal die Ruhe und verliert nie den Überblick. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist hervorragend und sieht auch bei starkem Andrang immer ordentlich aus. Wir waren schon in mehreren Hotels der gleichen Kategorie in Wien, aber hier gefällt es uns am besten.
negative_comment: Ich verstehe, dass der Föhn im Bad in die Schublade beim Waschtisch passen soll. Jedoch sollte er trotzdem seine Funktion erfüllen. Wir hatten einen eigenen Föhn dabei, und so war das nicht so schlimm für uns. Falls einmal neue Geräte erforderlich sind, sollte man sich Gedanken darüber machen.

title: Wer klassische Grand Hotels mag, kommt voll auf seine Kosten.

In every respect—transportation, breakfast, guest rooms, and service—this is a perfect hotel that exceeds the standards of a five-star establishment.
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Localização, cama muito confortável, pequeno-almoço excelente. Uma palavra especial pelo funcionário do pequeno-almoço, não fiquei com o seu nome, mas realmente uma lufada de ar fresco. Um obrigado especial a ele.
negative_comment: Entendo que seria um edifício antigo que foi recuperado, então só tem um elevador. Nada de mais e que em nada afetou a nossa estadia.

title: A surpresa de Viena
positive_comment: A localização do hotel é excelente. Os funcionários são muito simpáticos e proporcionaram um ambiente fantástico em todas as interações. O rooftop do Lamée é excecional. Ótimas bebidas e atendimento muito simpático. O restaurante que faz parte do grupo, também é muito bom. Quando voltar um dia, certamente repito a experiência de ficar aqui hospedada.
negative_comment: Não tenho criticas negativas a fazer, apenas uma observação, o quarto poderia ter estores, mas os blackout funcionam bem.

title: Excelente localização para conhecer Viena
positive_comment: Quarto de tamanho generoso. Camas confortáveis. O pequeno-almoço é bom.
negative_comment: O facto de o hotel funcionar em 2 edifícios é estranho. No Topazz há quartos, a recepção e o pequeno-almoço. No edifício em frente (Lamée) há quartos e um rooftop. Por causa do rooftop a porta da rua do Lamée está aberta e é normal entrarem clientes do rooftop para o elevador que dá acesso aos quartos e que funciona sem cartão. O acesso ao corredor dos quartos só ocorre com cartão. A casa de banho é aberta.

title: Excelente estadia
positive_comment: Quarto confortável. Bom pequeno almoço. Boa localização. Funcionários super simpáticos

title: Excelente localização.
positive_comment: A excelente localização é pequeno almoço dentro do esperado. Bons quartos e limpeza.
negative_comment: O facto de no último dia não nos terem mudado as toalhas de banho e o RoofTop apesar de indicarem que ia reabrir no verão maninha-se fechado.

positive_comment: Location excellent. Room very nice. Walking distance to most attractions.
negative_comment: Better if can have curtain to block the view between bedroom & bathroom since I was travelling with 3 adults. For couple, it should be fine.

positive_comment: Very central to U1. Clean towels every day. Provided iron and board when asked
negative_comment: No extra pillows when asked

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes
positive_comment: Very central location, handy for sights, restaurants and local transport. The breakfast was excellent, good quality and cooked to order. Pleasant staff and comfortable, spacious room.

title: Location is Superb.
positive_comment: The room gives a posh vibes. Location is superb. The staff upon check-in was very nice. That I can leave the luggage’s for sometime. Breakfast staff were so attentive.Thankful.
negative_comment:
Noise from neighbors doors during day time. 
Upon check-out, some unfriendly energy from the receptionist. Perhaps They’re already tired.

title: Fabuleux
positive_comment: L'hotel est un vrai monument chargé d'histoire. très bel emplacement les chambres sont spacieuses. tout est somptueux. Le  personnel est vraiment à votre écoute et très serviable.

title: Nous reviendrons

title: fabuleux et inoubliable
positive_comment:
L'hôtel est magnifique, le personnel à votre écoute, le concierge d'excellents conseils pour des visites, des sorties, des restaurants, le petit-déjeuner fabuleux, l'emplacement au centre de la vieille ville, proche de tous les points historiques, de la grande rue commerçante, des stations de métro et de taxi devant l'hôtel.
Bref, rien n'a redire.
De plus, j'ai été surclassé... cela restera un souvenir inoubliable... et si je dois revenir à Wienn, je n'irai qu'au Grand Hôtel

title: Un séjour parfait et exceptionnel dans un hôtel d une très grande qualité
positive_comment: Tout était exceptionnel. J’y ai fêté mes 50 ans , nous avons été surclassés dans une suite grandiose, cela m a fait énormément plaisir. Le personnel est très sympathique et très professionnel, a l ´écoute et aux petits soins . Nous avons mangé dans tous les restaurants de l’hôtel qui sont d’une très grande qualité surtout le 1870 , incroyable ! Et le Japonais excellent ! Le sushi bar aussi ouvert toute la journée, très bon et très pratique.. nous remercions tous le personnel et particulièrement notre femme de chambre , le serveur Dénis de la brasserie, le chef et serveur du restaurant 1870 , le cuisinier du sushi bar , le masseur Léon , les pianistes , la conciergerie et les bagagistes Dragan et Srecko , les réceptionnistes et Vanessa .. pour nous avoir fait passer un séjour merveilleux… Le petit déjeuner est extraordinaire, tout est frais et énormément de choix ! Nous avons hâte de revenir …

title: Exceptionnel
positive_comment: Proximité de l’opéra, emplacement parfait, personnel au petit soin, excellent Brunch, très bien décoré, aller au grand hôtel de Vienne vous fait rentrer dans un univers féerique!

Emplacement au top pour tout visiter à pieds ☺️
Petit déjeuner très copieux avec un personnel très professionnel
Prestige, personnel parfait. Pression sous la douche et petit déjeuner très bon et très copieux.
negative_comment: Pas écologique. Trop chauffé. Petit dentifrice, petit échantillons = pas écologique. La lumière est restée trop souvent allumée dans la chambre durant notre absence, car il n’y a pas de système de badge et les interrupteurs ne sont pas clairs.

title: Per assaporare in pieno l'atmosfera magica ed elegante di Vienna
positive_comment: Posizione stupenda davanti alla fermata della metro e ideale per fare qualunque tipo di escursione. Personale super gentile e disponibile, con camere funzionali ed eleganti. Dotate di ogni confort, anche in bagno.
negative_comment: Forse nella hall d'ingresso l'aria condizionata era un po' troppo forte.

title: Da ripetere sicuramente
positive_comment: Struttura eccezionale, posizione ottima, prezzo buono.

title: Hotel confortevole in ottima zona. Vienna è bellissima. Siamo stati d’incanto. Ritorneremo sicuramente
positive_comment: La gentilezza del concierge (signora italiana molto competente e disponibile)
negative_comment: Niente di negativo

positive_comment:
Ho avuto il piacere di soggiornare all'InterContinental Vienna by IHG e l'esperienza è stata assolutamente straordinaria. Il personale è stato incredibilmente accogliente e disponibile. . La stanza era impeccabile: pulita, elegante e confortevole, con ogni dettaglio curato per garantire il massimo del relax.
La vista sulla città di Vienna era mozzafiato. Un soggiorno perfetto che consiglio vivamente a chiunque voglia scoprire il cuore di Vienna con il massimo del comfort e della qualità.
Hotel accogliente ed elegante a due passi dal centro di Vienna. Accoglienza impeccabile e letto comodissimo.
La posizione abbastanza centrale, la ricchezza della colazione e le stanze.
La hall dell'albergo, la colazione e la cortesia del personale.
negative_comment: Le camere iniziano a mostrare la loro età.

positive_comment: I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience I had at your hotel. title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.
positive_comment: This is a beautiful hotel, in particular the larger rooms facing the Ringstrasse.  No issues with noise as the double glazing is very effective.  The gym is fairly small, but the sauna and steam room are excellent and very luxurious.  The breakfast is extensive and delicious.  Staff are super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)

title: Highly Recommended – Central, Elegant and Comfortable
positive_comment:
We had a wonderful stay at the hotel. The location is absolutely perfect, right in the heart of the city and within walking distance to all major attractions.

We were pleasantly surprised to receive a room upgrade, which made our stay even more special. The hotel itself is very elegant and stylish, and the rooms are thoughtfully designed and extremely comfortable.

The staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Cleanliness was impeccable, and everything was very well maintained.

Breakfast is à la carte and truly excellent — a great way to start the day.

Overall, we were extremely satisfied and would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended!
